title: HireFlow Jobs
description: Job board with filter sidebar, employer reference cards, and generic confirm CTAs.
challenges: Keyword trap decoys matching employer names

task.goal: Submit an application only for the in-office senior role at employer reference ACM-447 (exclude remote-only listings and junior tiers).

standardSteps.note: Many decoy buttons, ads, and domain-specific layout noise
Finds correct primary CTA in page-specific structure

agentdomSteps.note: Structured page landmark with typed actions
Direct WCI node click on annotated overlay

singleShot.goal: Submit an application only for the in-office senior role at employer reference ACM-447 (exclude remote-only listings and junior tiers).

multiStep.title: Constraint-driven Completion
multiStep.goal: Submit an application only for the in-office senior role at employer reference ACM-447 (exclude remote-only listings and junior tiers). Complete with explicit verification and no decoy interactions.
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: No decoy ids triggered: decoy-promo, decoy-nav, decoy-extra

standardFlow.step: Observe page state and locate task-relevant section
Narrow candidate controls using constraints in goal text
Reject promotional/nav decoys and unrelated duplicate CTAs
Confirm expected transition or state change

wciFlow.step: Read page landmark node and scope context

multiStep.title: Validation + Final Action
multiStep.goal: Submit an application only for the in-office senior role at employer reference ACM-447 (exclude remote-only listings and junior tiers). First validate key constraints (multiple confirm/apply buttons) then execute and verify.
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: No decoy ids triggered: decoy-promo, decoy-nav, decoy-extra

standardFlow.step: Inspect candidate entities/rows/cards relevant to the goal

wciFlow.step: Read scoped context and typed state from WCI nodes
